caption: A man in a white kurta is seen walking forward, accompanied by several other men. Some of the accompanying men are wearing suits and ties, while another is wearing a dark vest over a shirt. They are outdoors in a setting with trees visible in the background. The video is a news broadcast from "NEWS 18 इंडिया," featuring various on-screen graphics. A prominent red banner at the top asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". To the left and right of the main footage are smaller panels with portraits and names including "डिजी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिंदा", "मंत्री", "संतोष सुमन", and "सुमित कुमार". A red ticker runs across the bottom, and a time stamp reads "10:09 PM". As the sequence progresses, the group of men continues to move toward the right of the frame, with the man in the white kurta remaining central to the shot.
